title: How Adversarial Attacks Exploit Shortcut Learning
snippet: Current notions of non-robust features emphasize their presence in the data in some form. title: Constrained Optimization, The KKT conditions

title: The Structure of Adversarial Perturbations (Part I)
snippet: Adversarial vulnerability is a fundamental limitation of deep neural networks which remains poorly understood.
